chunks.text: Course: CS 194 | EECS at UC Berkeley CS 194. Special Topics Catalog Description: Topics will vary semester to semester. See the Computer Science Division announcements. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: COMPSCI 194 Related Areas: Security (SEC) Theory (THY) Prerequisites: Consent of instructor. Formats: Summer: 2.0-8.0 hours of lecture per week Fall: 1.0-4.0 hours of lecture per week Spring: 1.0-4.0 hours of lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Class Schedule (Spring 2026): CS 194-198 – TuTh 09:30-10:59, Soda 405; We 17:00-17:59, Evans 70 – Christian H Borgs Class Notes - Time conflicts are not allowed - Prerequisites: CS 70 AND either CS 170 or EECS 126 - Class Webpage: https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~borgs/CS194-198/ CS 194-202 – Tu 09:30-10:59, Soda 438 – Narges Norouzi , William R Boos Class Notes Please complete this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdz9FvBmoUvuktvcgqb8hB0njNLnmWjakE68HRHCZb-f0547A/viewform CS 194-271/294-271 – Tu 12:30-13:59, Soda 606 – Gireeja Vishnu Ranade , Narges Norouzi Class Notes Application to enroll: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdAkh4uCiQdYyfO4Df-6Nxwv36ZTtj6ex-HdloiQdy0f8H5gA/viewform Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
